content:
{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
[[File:Attack-Clones-Poster.jpg|thumb|200px|[[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']] was released in May 2002.]]

A list of events in '''2002''' related to ''[[Star Wars]]''.

==January==
*[[January 8|08]] – [[Star Wars Gamer 8|''Star Wars Gamer'' 8]] published at newsstands.
*[[January 9|09]] – [[Starfighter: Crossbones 1|''Starfighter: Crossbones'' 1]] published.
*09 – [[Star Wars Insider 58|''Star Wars Insider'' 58]] is released for subscribers.
*09 – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 2|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 2]] published.
*[[January 16|16]] – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 3|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 3]] published.
*[[January 18|18]] – [[Roy Conrad]] dies.
*[[January 23|23]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 38|''Star Wars'' (1998) 38]] released.
*23 – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 4|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 4]] published.
*[[January 29|29]] – ''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Journey]]'' published.
*29 – ''[[The Approaching Storm]]'' published.
*[[January 30|30]] – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 5|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 5'']] published.

==February==
*[[February 1|01]] – ''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Only Witness]]'' published.
*[[February 5|05]] – [[Star Wars Insider 58|''Star Wars Insider'' 58]] published.
*[[February 6|06]] – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 6|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 6]] published.
*06 – [[Dark Horse Extra|''Dark Horse Extra'' issue 44]] begins "[[Poison Moon (comic story)|Poison Moon]]," finishes in May.
*[[February 7|07]] – "[[Mission to Myrkr (web enhancement)|Mission to Myrkr]]" was published.
*[[February 13|13]] – ''[[Star Wars: Racer Revenge]]'' released.
*13 – [[Starfighter: Crossbones 2|''Starfighter: Crossbones'' 2]] published.
*13 – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 7|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 7]] published.
*[[February 15|15]] – [[Keene Curtis]] dies.
*[[February 20|20]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 39|''Star Wars'' (1998) 39]] published.
*20 – ''[[Star Wars Tales Volume 1]]'' published.
*20 – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 8|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 8]] published.
*[[February 25|25]] – [[Claire Davenport]] dies.
*[[February 26|26]] – ''[[Star Wars: Racer Revenge: Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]'' published.
*[[February 27|27]] – [[Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: The Aurorient Express 1|''Qui-Gon and Obi-Wan: The Aurorient Express'' 1]] published.
*27 – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 9|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 9]] published.
*[[February 28|28]] – [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 45|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' 45]] published.
*?? – ''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]'' published.
*?? – [[Star Wars Gamer 9|''Star Wars Gamer'' 9]] shipped to subscribers.

*07 – "[[The Nebula Assassin]]" was published.

*13 – [[Starfighter: Crossbones 3|''Starfighter: Crossbones'' 3]] published.
*13 – [[The Official Star Wars Fact File 11|''The Official Star Wars Fact File'' 11]] published.
